name: 亨利·马克
introduction: Henry Mark is an award-winning actor who was born and raised in Seattle, WA to immigrant parents. Studious and shy as a child, he was forced into his first acting role in grade school as part of a class assignment. Henry played a whimsical French chef defending a pumpkin on trial and surprised his classmates with his comedic chops.Henry took his first acting class as a sophomore at Rainier Beach High School to overcome his shyness and discovered a passion that over the years have lead him to perform in school plays, a sketch comedy group, community theatre, church events, business conventions, corporate videos, webisodes, PSA's, video games, commercials, television and film.Henry is trained in the Meisner technique by Robin Lynn Smith, a gifted instructor and founder of Freehold Theatre Lab in Seattle. He found the class to be life-changing and incredibly beneficial to his craft. Henry has been based in Los Angeles since 2013 and is grateful for the journey and the opportunities to do what he loves- creating characters to play out stories that entertain and/or inspire.
